title: Reward offered for missing parrot
description: GEORGE NEWS - A R2 000 reward is offered for...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A R2 000 reward is offered for the safe return of a missing Meyer's parrot named Knorrie.


> Knorrie could be anywhere in George, but recently escaped from his home in Denneoord and his owners are distraught.


Please look around in your gardens for any sign of Knorrie. He is about the size of a cockatiel. He is grey and green with a little bit of yellow on his wing and blue on his back.

Anyone with information about Knorrie's whereabouts is asked to phone Chane or Alta de Jager on 072 240 6851 or 071 683 9478.

Knorrie is missing. Please help his owners find him.
